title: Earthy Flaky Bulgur Wheat Crumble
description: A unique take on a sick-day French dish featuring earthy flavors and flaky textures from fermenting bulgur wheat.

ingredients.name: Fermentation Culture (optional, for added depth of flavor)
ingredients.notes: See package instructions for use and timing

instructions: Rinse the bulgur wheat under cold water to remove excess starch.
In a large mixing bowl, combine bulgur wheat with olive oil, fresh herbs, garlic powder, and salt. If using fermentation culture, incorporate it now into the mixture.
Knead the mixture until it starts to hold together, forming small pats that can be dropped from your fingers easily.
Place crumbles on a lined baking sheet or tray in a single layer.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy. Turn occasionally during baking.
Let cool slightly before serving with a drizzle of olive oil and additional fresh herbs if desired.
